text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's here... She's gone... She's here... She's
gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Manhattan Cafe's debut, and while
many of her peers are trembling with nerves, her
mind is elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Before the race... may I go and have a look?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I found her... She was there... Far beyond
the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She looked so happy. I knew I was right. So...
choice_data_list: Let's see if we can close that distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their game of cat and mouse—long played
without anyone knowing—finally takes to the turf.
